GM:(0,0,0)  M:(1,1,1)  N:(1/2,0,1/2)  P:(1/2,1/2,1/2)  PA:(-1/2,-1/2,-1/2)  X:(1/2,1/2,0)
GM:(0,0,0)  M:(1,1,1)  N:(1/2,0,1/2)  P:(1/2,1/2,1/2)  PA:(-1/2,-1/2,-1/2)  X:(1/2,1/2,0)
GM1  GM4  GM2  GM3  GM5  GM7  GM6  M1  M4  M2  M3  M5  M7  M6  N1  N2  N3N4  P1  P4  P2  P3  P5  P7  P6  PA1  PA4  PA2  PA3  PA5  PA7  PA6  X1  X2  X3  X4  X5
1 1 1 1 2 2 2 1 1 1 1 2 2 2 1 1 2 1 1 1 1 2 2 2 1 1 1 1 2 2 2 1 1 1 1 2
2a (4'/m'm'm,42m) A1 1 1;2a (4'/m'm'm,42m) A2 1 1;2a (4'/m'm'm,42m) B1 1 1;2a (4'/m'm'm,42m) B2 1 1;2a (4'/m'm'm,42m) E 2 1;2a (4'/m'm'm,42m) E1 2 1;2a (4'/m'm'm,42m) E2 2 1;2b (4'/m'm'm,42m) A1 1 1;2b (4'/m'm'm,42m) A2 1 1;2b (4'/m'm'm,42m) B1 1 1;2b (4'/m'm'm,42m) B2 1 1;2b (4'/m'm'm,42m) E 2 1;2b (4'/m'm'm,42m) E1 2 1;2b (4'/m'm'm,42m) E2 2 1;4c (m'm'm',222) A1 2 1;4c (m'm'm',222) B1 2 1;4c (m'm'm',222) B2 2 1;4c (m'm'm',222) B3 2 1;4d (42'm',4) 1E 2 1;4d (42'm',4) 2E 2 1;4d (42'm',4) A 2 1;4d (42'm',4) B 2 1;4d (42'm',4) 1E1 2 1;4d (42'm',4) 1E2 2 1;4d (42'm',4) 2E1 2 1;4d (42'm',4) 2E2 2 1;8f (2'/m,m) A' 4 0;8f (2'/m,m) A'' 4 0
